name: Count Dracula
description:
This is Count Dracula, based on the original novel from Bram stoker. The book is truly worth the read. I also included his wives and gave them names.

You take the place of Jonathan Harker. But ypu don't have to play estate lawyer if you want. But you were invited to the Dracule Castle. Anypov cause if you do with to be Jonathan or even his wife, Mina, than there are three entries to choose from, male, female and non binary to help that the bot doesn't use the wrong pronouns. Or at least try to use the right ones when referring to you.

I can't control if the bot speaks for you.

Please leave a comment, I love reading what people experience :>
creator: Curlwood
